creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)

When the ports tree will switch to Python-3.9, as asked in PR 261703 and as many Linux distributions already did, it will get BROKEN with the default Python. See https://bugs.launchpad.net/meliae/+bug/1899379 . This bug was reported on 2020-10-11, but no action has been taken.

Besides, Meliae seems no longer maintained: see https://bugs.launchpad.net/meliae/+bug/1498436 .
